{{Quote|The crew of the ''Valance'' would spill their guts to the Imps just to put themselves in the clear.|[[Lynaliskar K'ra Snyffulnimatta]] describes the ''Valance''{{'s}} crew|<ref name="DT:PTN" />}}
The '''''Valance''''' was a small [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] that was docked at the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] near [[Cadgel Meadows]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Following the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Cleansing of New Plympto|conflict]] with the native [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] population, the ''Valance'' and all other [[Starship/Legends|starships]] at the spaceport were grounded by the Empire. The crew of another ship docked in the port, the [[Maka-Eekai L4000 transport]] ''[[Uhumele]]'', believed that the crew of the ''Valance'' was willing to aid the Imperial forces and so shot and damaged the ''Valance'' while the ''Uhumele'' fled the planet.

==Description==
{{Quote|It's the small freighter with green markings—near the south edge of the field.|[[Crys Taanzer]] describes the ''Valance''|<ref name="DT:PTN" />}}
The ''Valance'' was a small [[Color/Legends|silver]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with a pair of wings that extended from both sides of the main fuselage. Each wing included an [[Engine/Legends|engine]] decorated with green markings. Three landing struts—one on the fuselage, and one below each engine—supported the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] when landed. The body of the ship also contained a forward-facing [[Viewport/Legends|viewport]] and two rear-facing fins, all located midship.<ref name="DT:PTN" />

==History==
{{Quote|Which ship is the one Sniffles mentioned—the ''Valance''—whose crew is in tight with the Imperials?|Dass Jennir asks about the ''Valance''|<ref name="DT:PTN" />}}
[[File:Valance_crippled.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Valance'' was crippled by Jennir's attack.]]
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the ''Valance'' and its crew were on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]], parked near the south edge of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] located in an area known as [[Cadgel Meadows]]. During its stay on New Plympto, the ''Valance'' and all other ships in the Cadgel Meadows spaceport were grounded by Imperial forces following the Empire's [[Cleansing of New Plympto|conflict]] with the native [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurians]].<ref name="DT:PTN" />

While the ''Valance'' was grounded, the crew of the [[Maka-Eekai L4000 transport]] ''[[Uhumele]]'', who were also grounded in the port, found reason to believe that the crew of the ''Valance'' would rather inform the Imperials of any attempt to escape the port than take part in one, in hopes of protecting themselves from the possible consequences. When the ''Uhumele'' did attempt to escape to avoid being searched by the Imperials, one of its crew, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Dass Jennir]], stole an Imperial [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|Alpha-3 ''Nimbus''-class V-wing starfighter]] and, acting on the assumption that the ''Valance''{{'s}} crew would not defy the Imperials, opened fire on the small freighter to give the impression that the Imperial forces were attacking the grounded ships. The ''Valance'' was damaged by the attack and collapsed forward onto its nose while the other ships in the port fled, as their crews believed that the Imperials meant to attack their vessels as well.<ref name="DT:PTN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Valance'' appeared in the [[Dark Times 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Dark Times: The Path to Nowhere|''Dark Times: The Path to Nowehere'']] story arc, which was illustrated by [[Douglas Wheatley]] and written by "Mick Harrison,"<ref name="DT:PTN" /> a pen name of [[Randy Stradley]].<ref name="Insider 127">{{InsiderCite|127|Blaster}}</ref> The comic issue was released on [[January 24]], [[2007]].<ref name="Dark Horse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/13-729/Star-Wars-Dark-Times-2--The-Path-to-Nowhere|text=Star Wars Dark Times 2: The Path to Nowhere}}</ref>
